title: task_created v1
description: Event emitted by the squad service (port 8060) when a new task is added to the task board. Published to the SOS bus so interested agents and workers get notified.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'task_created' for this schema.

source.description: Bus identity of the emitting agent. Must follow the 'agent:<name>' convention where name is lowercase alphanumeric with dashes.

target.description: Bus channel or agent address this message is routed to. Defaults to the shared task channel.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this event was emitted.

version.description: SemVer of the message payload schema. Major bumps are breaking; minor/patch are additive.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message envelope. Used for deduplication and tracing.

payload.description: Task-specific data describing the newly created task.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task within the task board. Alphanumeric, underscores, and dashes only.

title.description: Human-readable title of the task. Must be non-empty and fit within a single display line.

priority.description: Urgency level of the task. Determines scheduling order and agent wake policy.

description.description: Full task description, acceptance criteria, or context. Markdown is accepted.

assignee.description: Bus name of the agent assigned to execute this task. Lowercase alphanumeric with dashes. Omit to leave unassigned.

skill_id.description: Skill identifier required to execute this task. Used by the conductor for agent matching.

project.description: Project or tenant scope this task belongs to. Matches the project slug in the agent registry.

labels.description: Arbitrary string labels for filtering and grouping tasks. Each label must be unique within the array.

token_budget.description: Maximum number of tokens the assigned agent may spend on this task. Zero means no explicit cap.

bounty_cents.description: MIND-denominated bounty in cents awarded to the agent upon task completion. Zero means no bounty.
